author: cms-sw
body:
fixes cms-sw/cmssw#33781
`git-cms-checkdeps` does not checkout packages `*SubX/PackB*` if a file `SubA/PackA/*/file.h` is changed along with file `SubX/PackB/*/*` . These was a check which was ignoring all packages which contained  `*SubX/PackB*`. The check should have only  dropped `SubX/PackB/` package (as it is part of the PR itself).
title: bug fix: ignore only those packs which exactly match the change set
